title: クレーンゲーム大成功！

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Wow! That was incredible! You were like a claw
machine master!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
I can't believe how many plushies you managed to
get! Hehe!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
If I had this many when I was little, maybe I
wouldn't have been so stingy with Brian about
them.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Really? I'm not so sure about us having matching
plushies at our age...

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
But then again, it might be kind of fun. Hehe, I'll
mention it the next time I see her.
